content:
type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Adding domain param to trans tag: parse() while-loop (new 'domain' local var, intercepted when token.value=='domain' and next token is assign, string-literal validated), _make_node() gains trailing domain=None param appended after num_called_num, new module-level _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext helpers after _make_new_npgettext, _install_callables/_install/_install_null/_uninstall gain dgettext/dngettext params. Will re-read file before each edit and use narrow old_string anchors to avoid clobbering your metadata changes; suggest we each append our new _make_node param at the end of the signature so both additions coexist positionally.

All 830 existing tests pass. Wrote patch.txt.
